summary_en: ¥23/share final dividend for FY6/26 (ended 30 June 2026), ¥1 increase from prior forecast of ¥22/share. Full-year dividend unchanged at ¥23/share. Consolidated equity increased ¥322M YoY to ¥4,639M as of Q3 FY6/26.
title_en: Notice Regarding Revision of Full-Year Earnings Forecast and Year-End Dividend Forecast for FY6/26 (Dividend Increase)
translation_en_brief: IID, Inc. filed a notice on 15 May 2026 revising its earnings forecast and dividend forecast for the fiscal year ending 30 June 2026. The company raised its year-end dividend forecast from ¥22/share to ¥23/share, an increase of ¥1/share, resulting in a full-year dividend of ¥23/share (no interim dividend paid). The revision reflects improved financial health, with consolidated equity increasing ¥322M year-over-year to ¥4,639M as of 31 March 2026. Although the company downgraded full-year operating profit from ¥600M to ¥230M due to faster-than-expected contraction in high-margin advertising categories, management determined the balance-sheet strength and medium-to-long-term cash generation outlook supported the dividend increase while the company pursues strategic investments in AI capabilities and business portfolio diversification.
